papers.title: Transformer-Based Inpainting for Real-Time 3D Streaming in Sparse Multi-Camera Setups
papers.abstract: High-quality 3D streaming from multiple cameras is crucial for immersive experiences in many AR/VR applications. The limited number of views - often due to real-time constraints - leads to missing information and incomplete surfaces in the rendered images.

papers.title: Towards 3D Scene Understanding of Gas Plumes in LWIR Hyperspectral Images Using Neural Radiance Fields
papers.abstract: Neural radiance fields (NeRFs) create a latent neural representation of volumetric scene properties that enable novel-view rendering and geometry reconstruction, offering a promising avenue for hyperspectral 3D scene reconstruction.

papers.title: Real-Time Physical Action-Conditioned Video Generation
papers.abstract: RealWonder integrates three components: 3D reconstruction from single images, physics simulation, and a distilled video generator requiring only 4 diffusion steps. Our system achieves 13.2 FPS at 480x832 resolution, enabling interactive exploration of forces, robot actions, and camera controls.

papers.title: Towards Multimodal Lifelong Understanding: A Dataset and Agentic Baseline
papers.abstract: We propose a multimodal lifelong understanding framework that continuously learns from diverse data sources.

papers.title: Detecting Hallucinations in Vision-Language Models without Generating a Single Token
papers.abstract: We investigate whether hallucination risk can instead be predicted before any token is generated by probing a model's internal representations in a single forward pass.
